body.title: Metrics store: Postgres table + IgorBase methods + tool
body.description: Time-series metrics store. Table: metrics(timestamp, name, value, tags jsonb). record_metric() and query_metrics() on IgorBase (the existing one at igor_base.py:132). Tool: get_metrics_query so Igor can examine his own data. Existing metrics.py becomes a reader of the table instead of scraping log files. Forensic logger, push sources, gateway push via record_metric(). Goes through db_proxy like a good citizen.
